gapStatement: frank body is outperforming its closest competitors — now is the time to extend that lead before they catch up.

failedPrompts.query: Body scrub that exfoliates and moisturizes at same time
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Sol de Janeiro Bom Dia Brightening Body Scrub combines ground coffee exfoliation with hydrating coconut oil in one step. Alternatively, Aesop Purifying Body Exfoliant includes a balanced formula for both exfoliation and skin conditioning.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Dove Exfoliating Body Polish with Crushed Macadamia & Rice Milk offers both exfoliation and moisturization simultaneously, leaving the skin soft and nourished.

failedPrompts.query: Dry flaky patches on my skin that won't go away
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: CeraVe Hydrating Body Wash combined with AmLactin Daily Moisturizing Lotion addresses flaky patches better than scrubs alone. If you want exfoliation, use Aesop Purifying Body Exfoliant 1-2 times weekly, then moisturize immediately.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturizing Lotion is effective for treating dry, flaky patches. It's formulated with colloidal oatmeal to soothe and hydrate the skin.

failedPrompts.query: Honest reviews of coffee body scrubs do they help skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Coffee scrubs genuinely improve texture, brightness, and temporary cellulite appearance when used 2-3 times weekly. Results are real but modest—they're excellent exfoliants but not miracle workers for severe skin concerns.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Honest reviews of coffee body scrubs indicate positive improvements in skin texture and circulation, but not all users see significant results with cellulite reduction.
